description:
OL 316 (REV. 2/2017)  WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Cruise autonomous vehicle (“Cruise AV”), operating in autonomous mode, was traveling eastbound on Clay Street through the 
intersection with Van Ness Avenue when another vehicle made contact with the rear right bumper of the Cruise AV, damaging the Cruise 
AV’s right brake light assembly. There were no injuries and police were not called.
Go to Page 3
